candidates.label: GPT-5.5 · Bedrock
candidates.model_summary: OpenAI frontier reasoning model for complex professional work, served through Bedrock Mantle.
candidates.note: Smoke-tested locally on 2026-07-22. Public US East rate card: $5.50/M input and $33/M output.

candidates.label: Gemini 3.1 Pro · Vertex/WInE credential
candidates.model_summary: Google preview reasoning model; response and reasoning tokens share the output rate.
candidates.note: Smoke-tested locally on 2026-07-22. Standard ≤200K rate card: $2/M input and $12/M output.

candidates.label: Qwen3 32B · Bedrock
candidates.model_summary: Qwen's 32B dense model with hybrid thinking modes and a 32K context window.
candidates.note: Smoke-tested locally on 2026-07-22; cost remains unavailable until a region-matched public rate is pinned.

candidates.label: Qwen3 8B · Babel/vLLM
candidates.model_summary: Qwen's 8.2B dense hybrid-thinking model, served in BF16 on one Babel L40S with a 32K native context.
candidates.note: Smoke-tested end to end on 2026-07-22. There is no per-token vendor charge; GPU allocation time must be measured separately.
